4896(1) {'1077': 439, '1078': 2, '1086': 'Sailing options', '1088': 'sailing, combat, options, interface, toggle, style, weapon', '1091': 3606, '1096': 'Determines whether or not the sailing options interface is selectable when outside of a boat.'}
4897(1) {'1077': 440, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Show warning before drinking a forgotten drink from a crate at sea.', '1088': 'Show warning before drinking a forgotten drink from a crate at sea, gameplay, sailing', '1096': 'When enabled, shows a warning before drinking a forgotten drink from a crate at sea.', '1119': 1}
4899(1) {'1077': 441, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Sailing charting popups', '1088': 'sailing, notification, skilling, task, popup, toggle', '1096': 'When enabled, completing charting something new will be accompanied by a popup box.'}
4932(1) {'1077': 442, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Sailing port task cancellation warning', '1088': 'sailing, cancel, port, warning, skilling, task, popup, toggle', '1096': 'When enabled, players will not be warned when cancelling port tasks.'}
4933(1) {'1077': 443, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Current duck hintarrow', '1088': 'sailing, current, duck, hint, arrow, hintarrow, disable, toggle', '1096': 'When enabled, a hintarrow will be placed over the head of your active current duck.'}

params {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut: Entry Mode', '1314': 544, '1315': 52, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of less then 150 considered an Entry raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Beneath Cursed Sands

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Medium
- Hard
- Elite', '1322': 46337, '1323': 9653, '1324': 0, '1325': 174, '1326': 79, '1327': 188, '1328': 0, '1329': 1350}		 {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut: Entry Mode', '1314': 544, '1315': 53, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of less then 150 considered an Entry raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Beneath Cursed Sands

Combat Achievement task difficulty:

- Elite', '1322': 46337, '1323': 9653, '1324': 0, '1325': 174, '1326': 79, '1327': 188, '1328': 0, '1329': 1350}
376(1)
params {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut', '1314': 544, '1315': 53, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of 150 to 299 considered a standard raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Beneath Cursed Sands

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Elite
- Master
- Grandmaster', '1322': 46337, '1323': 9653, '1324': 0, '1325': 174, '1326': 79, '1327': 188, '1328': 0, '1329': 1350}		 {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut', '1314': 544, '1315': 54, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of 150 to 299 considered a standard raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom

- Grandmaster', '1322': 46337, '1323': 9653, '1324': 0, '1325': 174, '1326': 79, '1327': 188, '1328': 0, '1329': 1350}
377(1)
params {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut: Expert Mode', '1314': 544, '1315': 54, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of 300 or greater considered an Expert raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Beneath Cursed Sands

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Elite
- Master
- Grandmaster', '1322': 46337, '1323': 9653, '1324': 0, '1325': 174, '1326': 79, '1327': 188, '1328': 0, '1329': 1350}		 {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut: Expert Mode', '1314': 544, '1315': 55, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of 300 or greater considered an Expert raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Beneath Cursed Sands

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Elite
- Master
- Grandmaster', '1322': 46337, '1323': 9653, '1324': 0, '1325': 174, '1326': 79, '1327': 188, '1328': 0, '1329': 1350}

params {'1313': 'Vet'ion', '1314': 454, '1315': 60, '1317': 52793034, '1319': 'Vet'ion is a Zamorakian skeletal champion that resides north of the Bone Yard and south of Lava Dragon Isle in the Wilderness.

Immunities - Poison, Venom

params {'1313': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges', '1314': 900, '1315': 55, '1317': 41686007, '1319': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's is an elite Tzhaar warrior found within the inner city of Mor Ul Rek.

TzHaar-Ket-Rak offers a number of challenges where those who have proven themselves within the Fight Caves or the Inferno can go up against an ever increasing number of JalTok-Jads.', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:

TzHaar-Ket-Rak's First and Second Challenges
- 1 Fight Caves completion

TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Third to Sixth Challenges
- 1 Inferno completion

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Elite
- Master
- Grandmaster', '1322': 41571, '1323': 8859, '1324': 20, '1325': 230, '1326': 100, '1327': 150, '1328': 0, '1329': 2000}		 {'1313': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges', '1314': 900, '1315': 56, '1317': 41686007, '1319': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's is an elite Tzhaar warrior found within the inner city of Mor Ul Rek.

params {'1306': 433, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Akkha', '1309': 'Complete Akkha in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Akkha's attacks off-prayer, Akkha's special attacks (orbs, memory, detonate), exploding shadow timers, orbs in the enrage phase or attacking Akkha with the wrong style. Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Akkha invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 53} {'1306': 433, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Akkha', '1309': 'Complete Akkha in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Akkha's attacks off-prayer, Akkha's special attacks (orbs, memory, detonate), exploding shadow timers, orbs in the enrage phase or attacking Akkha with the wrong style. 5923 sailing_chance_encounter_glow 150
5924 sailing_chance_encounter_clue_turtle 150
5925 sailing_chance_encounter_lost_goods 150
5926 sailing_chance_encounter_clam 150
5927 sailing_chance_encounters_rescue_man1 151
5928 sailing_chance_encounters_rescue_woman1 151
5929 sailing_chance_encounters_rescue_dog1 151
5930 sailing_crew_generic_1 154 [[1], None, [14600], [14603, 14604, 14605], [6593], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [2], [1], [3]]
5931 sailing_crew_generic_2 154 [[2], None, [14609], [14612, 14613, 14614], [6595], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [3], [2], [1]]
5932 sailing_crew_generic_3 154 [[3], None, [14618], [14621, 14622, 14623], [6598], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1], [4], [1]]
5933 sailing_crew_generic_4 154 [[4], None, [14627], [14630, 14631, 14632], [6600], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [2], [3], [1]]
5934 sailing_crew_generic_5 154 [[5], None, [14636], [14639, 14640, 14641], [6602], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [4], [1], [1]]
5935 sailing_crew_werewolf 154 [[6], None, [14645], [14648, 14649, 14650], [6597], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [2], [4], [2]]
5936 sailing_crew_fremennik 154 [[7], None, [14654], [14657, 14658, 14659], [6599], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [3], [3], [2]]
5937 sailing_crew_spirit_angler 154 [[8], None, [14663], [14666, 14667, 14668], [6601], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [4], [2], [2]]
5938 sailing_crew_captain_siad 154 [[9], None, [14671], [14674, 14675, 14676], [6594], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [3], [2], [3]]
5939 sailing_crew_ghost_jenkins 154 [[10], None, [14680], [14683, 14684, 14685], [6596], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [2], [2], [4]]
5940 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_completeporttasks 156 Complete 3 port tasks.
5941 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_collectsalvage 156 Gather a piece of salvage.
5942 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_identifysalvage 156 Identify a piece of salvage.
5943 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_tutorialcomplete 156 Complete the Pandemonium quest.
5944 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_chartpoints 156 Chart 3 points of interest at sea.
5945 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_barracudafirst 156 Complete the Tempor Tantrum trial once.
5946 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_barracudaswordfish 156 Achieve the Swordfish rank at the Tempor Tantrum by collecting 1 rum shipment and 14 supplies in 2:00.
5947 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_barracudashark 156 Achieve the Shark rank at the Tempor Tantrum by collecting 2 rum shipments and 25 supplies in 3:06.
5948 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_barracudamarlin 156 Achieve the Marlin rank at the Tempor Tantrum by collecting 3 rum shipments and 36 supplies in 5:00.
5949 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_openchartlog 156 Open your Captain's Log to read about charting locations.
5950 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_chartcurrentduck 156 Chart a location using your current duck.
5951 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_chartspyglass 156 Chart a location with your spyglass.
5952 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_chartmermaid 156 Chart a location with the help of a mermaid.
5953 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_chartweather 156 Chart a location by helping a troll.
5954 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_chartdrinkcrate 156 Chart a location by prying open a crate with a crowbar and investigating the contents inside.
5955 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_pryingtimes 156 Complete the Prying Times miniquest.
5956 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_dognose 156 Set foot on Dognose Island.
5957 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_isleofbones 156 Set foot on the Isle of Bones.
5958 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_lastlight 156 Set foot on Last Light.
5959 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_charredisland 156 Set foot on Charred Island.
5960 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_oakhull 156 Build an Oak hull, to overcome gentle rapids.
5961 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_oakmast 156 Build an Oak mast, to overcome stormy seas.
5962 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_bronzesalvagehook 156 Build a Bronze salvaging hook on your boat.
5963 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_windcatcher 156 Build a Wind Catcher on your boat.
5964 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_buyboat 156 Buy a basic small boat from a Shipwright.
5965 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_recruitcrewmate 156 Recruit a crewmate.
5966 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_editcrew 156 Edit your crewmates with the crew registrar.
5967 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_assigncrew 156 Assign a crewmate to steer your boat.
5968 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_crewdepositcargo 156 Have a crewmate deposit cargo to your boat.
5969 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_crewcannon 156 Have a crewmate attack an enemy at sea.
5970 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_buildcannon 156 Build a cannon on your boat.
5971 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_killshark 156 Kill a shark at sea.
5972 sailing_alpha_runefest_task_bountytask 156 Complete a bounty task.
5973 sailing_alpha_runefest_feature_tutorial 155 [[0], [Introduction], [Learn the ropes of Sailing!], [Get your sea legs - and your first boat - with the introductory Sailing quest, <col=FF981F>Pandemonium</col>!

If you need a refresher later, check the <col=FF981F>FAQ</col> tab.], [1], [5943], [Where do I start the quest?, This quest can be started by talking to <col=FF981F>Will and Anne</col> near the food shop in Port Sarim., I left the Pandemonium early. How do I get back?, The ship that travels between Port Sarim and Musa Point now also visits the Pandemonium. Just ask <col=FF981F>Captain Tobias</col> in the middle of Port Sarim after your first visit!, Where do I get a boat?, <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPCs</col> can sell you a new boat., How do I get on my boat?, Once you have a boat, you can board it by interacting with a <col=FF981F>Gangplank</col>. Look for the <col=FF981F>white and red wind sock</col> on the southern dock at Port Sarim., How do I get off my boat?, You can disembark by sailing near a <col=FF981F>Gangplank</col> and interacting with it from your boat., How do I sail my boat?, Interact with the <col=FF981F>Helm</col> at the back of your boat to start navigating. Use your <col=FF981F>Sails</col> to control your speed, and use the sea to turn., What does it mean when I feel a gust of wind?, Occasionally you'll feel a <col=FF981F>gust of wind</col>. This means the wind is blowing strongly. If you <col=FF981F>trim your sails while the wind is gusting</col>, your boat will get a temporary <col=FF981F>speed boost</col>!, I lost my boat! How do I get it back?, <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPCs</col> are able to retrieve and repair capsized boats - for a fee! You can find one near the southern dock in Port Sarim., My boat is at a different port! How do I get it back?, <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPCs</col> will retrieve boats from other ports for you, for a small amount of coins. You can find one near the southern dock in Port Sarim., My boat got stuck! How do I fix it?, You can access the <col=FF981F>reverse</col> option by stopping the boat and then clicking the down arrow on the sailing side panel, this should resolve most cases. If you are still stuck you can <~text_device(^standard_rightclick, ^mobile_rightclick)> the <col=FF981F>Helm</col> and select the <col=FF981F>escape</col> option.], [3721], [5761], [Completing this activity will finish the Pandemonium quest and raise your Sailing level to 10. Do you want to continue?]]
5974 sailing_alpha_runefest_feature_port_tasks 155 [[1], [Port Tasks], [Complete jobs for rewards!], [Help needed!

The locals and merchants always need a hand, so visit one of the <col=FF981F>Notice Boards</col> at a port to see what jobs are available.

Pick up cargo from the <col=FF981F>Ledger Table</col> and deposit it in your boat's <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col> to complete deliveries at sea!

<col=9F9F9F>For this beta, the selection of available tasks has been limited.], [3], [5940], [How do I get a port task?, Port Tasks are acquired by visiting <col=FF981F>Notice Boards</col> at various ports. At Port Sarim, this is located near the southern-most port., How do I see my current task?, Your current task can be viewed by <~text_device(^standard_rightclick, ^mobile_rightclick)> your <col=FF981F>Captain's Log</col> item and selecting <col=FF981F>View Task</col>. Your Captain's Log can be obtained from your ship's <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col>., How do I complete a courier task?, After acquiring a courier task, collect the required number of crates from the <col=FF981F>Ledger Table</col>, board your boat, and deposit them in the <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col>. Sail to the destination port, then withdraw and deliver your cargo to the <col=FF981F>Ledger Table</col> there!, When do the available tasks change?, Tasks are <col=FF981F>endlessly repeatable</col>. Currently the pool of tasks change every day. However, the team is reviewing alternative ways of refresing the tasks available.], [31427], [5760], [Starting this activity will raise your Sailing level to 10, clear your inventory and equipment, and delete any boats you have. Do you want to continue?]]
5975 sailing_alpha_runefest_feature_shipwrecks 155 [[2], [Shipwreck Salvaging], [Gather sunken loot!], [One captain's misfortune is another captain's treasure!

Using the <col=FF981F>Salvaging Hook</col> facility on your boat, seek out wreckages of past voyages and recover lost goods with this <col=FF981F>AFK</col> activity.

Bring your salvage back to port and sort through it at a <col=FF981F>Salvaging Station</col> to identify your haul.

Valuable resources, sunken cargo, or even lost treasure await!

<col=9F9F9F>For this beta, only low-level shipwrecks are accessible.], [12], [5962, 5941, 5942], [Where can I find a shipwreck?, Shipwrecks have been seen around the <col=FF981F>Bedabin Basin</col>, and south of <col=FF981F>Khazard's Channel</col>., How do I salvage a shipwreck?, To gather salvage, stop your boat next to a shipwreck and interact with the <col=FF981F>Salvaging Hook</col> facility on your boat., How do I identify salvage?, To identify your haul, visit a <col=FF981F>Salvaging Station</col> at a port with salvage in your inventory., How do I get a salvaging hook?, Visit a <col=FF981F>Shipyard</col> at a port to construct new facilities on your boat, including, but not limited to, salvaging hooks.], [31641], [5762], [Starting this activity will raise your Sailing level to 15, clear your inventory and equipment, and delete any boats you have. Do you want to continue?]]
5976 sailing_alpha_runefest_feature_charting 155 [[3], [Charting the Sea], [Seek out points of interest!], [All sorts of mysteries can be found in the nooks and crannies of the ocean!

Use your <col=FF981F>Captain's Log</col> and <col=FF981F>Charting Tools</col> to discover secrets and chart the seas as you <col=FF981F>explore</col>. Keep your eye open for <col=FF981F>ripples</col>, <col=FF981F>interesting scenery</col>, or <col=FF981F>NPCs that need a hand</col>!

<col=9F9F9F>For this beta, the number of available charting spots has been limited.], [5], [5949, 5944, 5951, 5950, 5952, 5953, 5954], [How do I chart the sea?, Your <col=FF981F>Captain's Log</col> item will show you a list of <col=FF981F>locations</col> to chart, as well as any required <col=FF981F>tools</col>. Bring the tool to that location, and then keep an eye out for something interesting to chart!, How do I get a Captain's Log?, You can retrieve a new <col=FF981F>Captain's Log</col> from your ship's <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col>., How do I get the tools I need?, You can retrieve <col=FF981F>Charting Tools</col> from your ship's <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col>., How do I use the spyglass?, To use the spyglass, look for <col=FF981F>ripples</col> around an area mentioned in your captain's log., How do I test currents?, You can chart currents using your <col=FF981F>Current Duck</col>. Once you have found the charting spot, deploy your Current Duck and follow it until it stops!, How do I get help from the mermaid guide?, To document water depth with a mermaid guide, you must solve their cryptic clue and tell them what the relevant items are. The clues are hard!, How do I help the weather troll?, To chart points involving a weather troll, you need to first fix their <col=FF981F>Portable Weather Station</col> using your <col=FF981F>Anti Rust Tonic</col>. Then, use it to find where the wind dies down - remember, you find calm <col=FF981F>in the eye of the storm!</col>], [31529], [5763], [Starting this activity will raise your Sailing level to 15, clear your inventory and equipment, and delete any boats you have. Do you want to continue?]]
5977 sailing_alpha_runefest_feature_barracuda 155 [[6], [Barracuda Trials], [Daredevil time-trials!], [The thrill-seeking Barracuda sailors are taking on a series of <col=FF981F>dangerous time-trials</col> around the sea. Do you have what it takes to achieve Marlin rank?

For the best ranks:
- <col=FF981F>Sail through rapids</col> to move faster
- Avoid storm clouds
- Collect every crate
- Keep your sails trimmed!

<col=9F9F9F>For this beta, only one trial is available: The Tempor Tantrum.], [30], [5945, 5946, 5947, 5948], [How do I start the trial?, The Tempor Tantrum trial can be started by sailing to <col=FF981F>Rum-dashed Ralph</col> north of Tempoross Cove., Why am I taking damage?!, The stormy seas can only be navigated safely with <col=FF981F>a strong-enough sail</col>. In addition, the <col=FF981F>speed-boosting rapids</col> require a strong-enough <col=FF981F>hull</col> to use safely., How do I complete the trial?, To complete the Tempor Tantrum, sail south to collect a <col=FF981F>Rum Shipment</col> from the <col=FF981F>Merchant Ship</col>, then return it to <col=FF981F>Rum-dashed Ralph</col> as fast as possible. Higher ranks require more shipments delivered!, What are lost supplies?, Each rank requires an amount of <col=FF981F>Lost Supplies</col> to be recovered as you deliver shipments. Simply <col=FF981F>sail over them</col> to collect them!, How do I earn higher ranks?, Higher ranks can be earned by completing the trial within a time limit and collecting enough <col=FF981F>Lost Supplies</col>. See the Tasks tab for each rank's requirements., How do I go faster?, The <col=FF981F>route</col> you take is key to getting a fast time. In addition, sailing over <col=FF981F>Rapids</col> and <col=FF981F>trimming your sails</col> will make your boat move faster!], [27414], [5764], [Starting this activity will raise your Sailing level to 30, clear your inventory and equipment, and delete any boats you have. Do you want to continue?]]
5978 sailing_alpha_runefest_feature_exploration 155 [[4], [Exploration], [Discover new tales!], [The open seas hold many tales yet to be written! You never know what you'll stumble upon as you drift around the ocean.

Seek out <col=FF981F>small islands</col> to discover what they hold, and maybe see if anyone needs a hand at <col=FF981F>The Pandemonium</col>.], [15], [5955, 5956, 5957, 5958, 5959], [How do I disembark at an island with no dock?, Small islands have <col=FF981F>Mooring Points</col> instead of docks, for embarking and disembarking.], [2574], [5765], []]
5979 sailing_alpha_runefest_feature_shipyard 155 [[5], [The Shipyard], [Upgrade your boat!], [A higher-levelled sailor needs a higher-levelled boat!

Visit the Shipyard to upgrade and customise each part of your boat to <col=FF981F>withstand stormier seas</col>, <col=FF981F>complete quicker journeys</col>, or just make it look nicer!

You can also build new <col=FF981F>facilities</col> to give your boat new functions, like a Salvaging Hook to plunder sunken ships...

<col=9F9F9F>In this beta, the amount of options is limited.], [10], [5964, 5960, 5961, 5963], [How do I get to the shipyard?, The shipyard can be accessed by talking to a <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPC</col>. One can be found around the south of Port Sarim., How do I change my boat's hull or sail?, You can change your hull and sail by checking the <col=FF981F>Boat Schematics</col> board in the Shipyard., How do I build facilities on my boat?, While in the Shipyard, <~text_device(^standard_leftclick, ^mobile_leftclick)> the <col=FF981F>gangplank</col> to board your boat. From there, you can interact with the <col=FF981F>hotspots</col> to build new facilities. Remember to bring a hammer and saw!, How do I leave my boat in the Shipyard?, While on your boat, <~text_device(^standard_leftclick, ^mobile_leftclick)> the <col=FF981F>gangplank</col> to return to the Shipyard dock.], [2949], [5766], []]
5980 sailing_alpha_runefest_feature_combat 155 [[7], [Combat], [Fight using your boat!], [Experienced sailors know how to use their boat as a weapon.

Prepare by building <col=FF981F>cannons</col> on your boat, then use them to <col=FF981F>defeat enemies at sea</col>. It is strongly advised to recruit some crew mates to help you with boat combat.

You can use combat to complete <col=FF981F>bounty tasks</col>, or to obtain <col=FF981F>loot</col> from sea creatures...

<col=9F9F9F>In this beta, the amount of enemies to fight is limited, with more expected for full launch.], [12], [5970, 5971, 5972], [How do I fight something?, With a cannon on your boat, you must first interact with the cannon. Afterwards, <~text_device(^standard_leftclick, ^mobile_leftclick)> the enemy to start firing at them. Make sure you have cannonballs with you!, Where can I get cannonballs?, In the beta there is a chest near the Shipwrights in Port Sarim and within the Shipyard that contains useful supplies like cannonballs. On release, players can expect to smith cannonballs to obtain them., Where can I find something to fight?, There are many different enemies to fight across the sea. To begin with, consider fighting the sharks just east of Musa Point, or near Crandor. Tip: Bounty tasks can teach you where to find specific enemies.], [2], [5767], []]
5981 sailing_alpha_runefest_feature_crew 155 [[8], [Crewmates], [Help on your boat!], [As you become a better sailor, you learn to delegate. A good captain knows how to command their crew effectively.

You can <col=FF981F>recruit crewmates</col> from various places in the world, though mostly from pubs. Once recruited, you can find them again on <col=FF981F>The Pandemonium</col>.

Speak to the <col=FF981F>Crew Registrar</col> at the Pandemonium to <col=FF981F>edit your crewmates</col>. This is your chance to pick which recruited crewmates you want sailing with you.
While on the boat, you can <col=FF981F>command your crew</col> to use specific facilities by using the sidepanel, or by speaking to them directly.

<col=9F9F9F>In this beta, the amount of crewmates are limited, with more expected for full launch.], [7], [5965, 5966, 5967, 5968, 5969], [Where can I find crewmates to recruit?, Crematesw must be recruited before they can be assigned to your boat. They can be found in multiple places across the world. In the beta you can find some of them in the pub in Port Sarim., Why are there no crewmates on my boat?, Once recruited, speak to the Crew Registrar on the Pandemonium to edit the crewmates assigned to your boats. Note that the raft is too small to fit any crewmates on!, How do I assign a crewmate?, In the facility view within the Sailing sidepanel there are buttons at the end of each row. If a crewmate is already assigned to the facility, you can see their face on the button. If none is assigned, press the button to bring up a list of crewmates you can select from to assign them to the facility. Alternatively, speak to the crewmate directly to assign them.
Crewmates are especially useful when doing combat, as they can steer your boat for you while you fire the cannon. Alternatively you can swap it around - navigate your boat while commanding your crew to cannon anything you point them to., Why won't the crew do what I command?, Crewmates will usually tell you why they can't do what you command. Check out what they are yelling, or check your chatbox for feedback. Common reasons include the crewmate doesn't have the skill required to use the facility you ordered them to use, or you sailed into hazardous waters causing them to panic! Or perhaps they simply don't like your tone. Have you tried saying 'please'?
Note that only the captain of a boat may assign crewmates.], [7130], [5768], []]
5982 sailing_alpha_runefest_feature_about 155 [[9], [About], [Sailing Beta details.], [Welcome to the <col=FF981F>Sailing Beta</col>! A variety of features are on offer, each a part of the <col=FF981F>Sailing skill</col>. Try them out, and share your feedback with us through the linked survey or social media.

Please note the following:

- Sailing is heavily work-in-progress. <col=FF981F>Gameplay and graphics are not final.</col>

- XP rates and rewards are not yet balanced.

- You may experience flickering and other graphical issues in non-sailing content.], [1], None, [What can I try in the beta?, The following features are available to try:
- Boat movement and navigation
- Intro quest
- Boat combat
- Crewmates
- Port Tasks
- Shipwreck salvaging
- Charting the Sea
- Barracuda Trials
- Customisation at the Shipyard
- Prying Times quest
- The Pandemonium island, What else is planned that is not in the beta?, The following features are planned, but not available in the beta:- Deep sea trawling
- More NPC boats
- More quests
- More islands
- Higher level content for Port Tasks, Shipwreck Salvaging, Charting and Barracuda Trials, When will Sailing launch?, We hope Sailing to be ready <col=FF981F>later this year</col>, if all goes well!], [7542], [5769], [Resetting the beta will clear all progress. Are you sure you wish to continue?]]
5983 sailing_shipwrecks_kharidian_sea_small_wrecks 157
5984 sailing_shipwrecks_guthanoth_cove_fisherman_wrecks 157
5985 sailing_shipwrecks_barracuda_belt_barracuda_wrecks 157
5986 sailing_shipwrecks_sapphire_sea_large_wrecks 157
5987 sailing_shipwrecks_sapphire_sea_pirate_wrecks 157
5988 sailing_shipwrecks_crystal_coast_mercenary_wrecks 157
5989 sailing_shipwrecks_piscatoris_sea_colossal_wrecks 157
5990 sailing_shipwrecks_sea_of_souls_merchant_wrecks 157
5991 sailing_shipwrecks_wild_coast_haunted_wrecks 157
5992 port_task_port_sarim_courier_0 158 [[1], [Courier wanted], [0], [1], [0], [5701], [5701], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31680, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6121], [I accidentally received this crate of steel swords. Luckily I made a good deal with some pirates on the Pandemonium to buy them, but I need someone reliable to transfer the crate for me.
- Brian]]
5993 port_task_port_sarim_courier_1 158 [[2], [Lonely crate looking for local courier], [0], [10], [0], [5701], [5701], [5704], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31681, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6120], [I've got some surplus stock I need to shift while it's fresh. The Shrimp and Parrot have agreed to take the crate off my hands. Hasty delivery to Musa Point required.
- Gerrant]]
5994 port_task_port_sarim_courier_2 158 [[3], [Banana delivery], [0], [10], [0], [5701], [5704], [5701], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31682, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6114], [My shop is running low on bananas. I need a reliable sailor to fetch me a crate of them from Musa Point and bring them back to Port Sarim.
- Wydin]]
5995 port_task_port_sarim_courier_3 158 [[4], [Banana compensation], [0], [10], [0], [5701], [5701], [5704], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31683, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6120], [The last courier I hired returned with an entire crate full of rotten bananas. Luthas won't replace them without proof, so I need someone to return them, post haste!
- Wydin]]
5996 port_task_port_sarim_courier_4 158 [[5], [A bartender's problem], [0], [9], [0], [5701], [5701], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31684, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6121], [I've received a request from the bartender on the Pandemonium asking for some extra beer. Seems they've been getting more traffic than normal. I need a sailor to get there as soon as possible.
- Russell, The owner of the Rusty Anchor]]
5997 port_task_port_sarim_courier_5 158 [[6], [Logs astray], [0], [10], [0], [5701], [5704], [5701], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31685, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6114], [We accidentally took an extra shipment of logs when we docked at Port Sarim. The crewmate responsible is now scrubbing our decks. Please pick up the logs and return them to Port Sarim.
- Captain Wilbur]]
5998 port_task_port_sarim_courier_6 158 [[7], [Rum run], [0], [15], [0], [5701], [5701], [5704], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31687, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6120], [I want to try some mainland rum. Everyone says our Karamjan rum is the best, but how can I know without trying the alternatives? Fetch me some from Port Sarim.
- Zambo]]
5999 port_task_port_sarim_courier_7 158 [[8], [Legal' courier services requested], [0], [15], [0], [5701], [5704], [5701], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31688, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6114], [We need someone <str>gullible</str> capable to take this completely legal crate containing only bananas to Port Sarim.
- 'Plantation workers']]
6000 port_task_port_sarim_courier_8 158 [[9], [Keg removal services required], [0], [7], [0], [5701], [5702], [5701], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31689, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6114], [Yo ho ho! Business is booming, but unfortunately, our next keg collection date isn't till next week! Looking for a Jolly Roger to collect them from the Pandemonium and drop them off in Port Sarim.
- Steve Beanie]]
6001 port_task_port_sarim_courier_9 158 [[10], [Bait to Catherby], [0], [21], [0], [5701], [5701], [5707], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31690, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6117], [Something went wrong and I received a shipment of bait which was due for Catherby. I need a sailor who can navigate safely past Crandor to take it there for me. Give Harry my regards.
- Gerrant]]
6002 port_task_port_sarim_courier_10 158 [[11], [Sarah's potatoes], [0], [26], [0], [5701], [5701], [5707], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31691, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6117], [I've been looking to diversify my income streams. There's a chef in Catherby who is interested in using some of my home grown potatoes in some of his recipes. I need three crates taking to him, preferably before they sprout roots.
- Sarah]]
6003 port_task_port_sarim_courier_11 158 [[12], [A mislaid port order], [0], [25], [0], [5701], [5707], [5709], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31692, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [6116], [I received a work order to deliver some compost from Ellena in Catherby to Praistan in Brimhaven. I need a sailor to head to Catherby and pick up the shipment before delivering it to Brimhaven.
- Port Sarim Port Master]]
6004 port_task_port_sarim_courier_12 158 [[13], [Salamander protection], [0], [30], [0], [5701], [5701], [5710], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31693, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6115], [I don't know who did it, but someone left two crates full of red salamanders on my doorstep. I need someone to take them to Ardougne for me to be released into their natural habitat.
- Betty]]
6005 port_task_port_sarim_courier_13 158 [[14], [Tar export required], [0], [30], [1], [5701], [5701], [5711], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31694, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6122], [I've got an order of swamp tar that needs delivering to the general store in Port Khazard. Don't worry about leakage. I've already floured the inside of the crate to keep it sealed tight.
- Tarquin, Tar merchant]]
6006 port_task_port_sarim_courier_14 158 [[15], [Sword identification], [0], [29], [1], [5701], [5711], [5701], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31695, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [6114], [I sent some rusty swords to be cleaned up by Tindel in Port Khazard a couple of weeks ago and I need someone to go and fetch them for me. Don't try to steal from me.
- Bandit, Owner of the esteemed Varrock sword shop]]
6007 port_task_port_sarim_courier_15 158 [[16], [Armour courier], [0], [1], [0], [5701], [5701], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31714, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6121], [I need someone to deliver this crate of armour to the Pandemonium for me. Some legitimate businessmen there wish to use it for their adventures at sea.
- Horvik]]
6008 port_task_port_sarim_courier_16 158 [[17], [Spices needed], [0], [1], [0], [5701], [5702], [5701], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31716, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6114], [I have some very important spices I need collecting from the Pandemonium and delivering to Port Sarim. They are essential in some new concoctions I have planned.
- Hetty]]
6009 port_task_catherby_courier_0 158 [[18], [Fresh lobster delivery], [0], [20], [0], [5707], [5707], [5704], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31696, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6120], [There's a rowdy pirate at Musa Point who insists that the lobsters caught there taste better than those caught in Catherby, I don't care for the dispute personally, but I'm happy to send some of ours over all the same.
- Harry]]
6010 port_task_catherby_courier_1 158 [[19], [Wax, wax and more wax], [0], [20], [0], [5707], [5707], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31698, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6121], [I received a request for an abundance of wax to go to the Pandemonium. I don't know what it's for and I frankly don't care, especially at the price they're paying me.
- Candle Maker]]
6011 port_task_catherby_courier_2 158 [[20], [Caleb's Coconuts], [0], [21], [0], [5707], [5702], [5707], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31699, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6117], [I've heard that there's a new type of coconut on the Pandemonium. Go fetch me some so I can experiment with some new dishes. Two crates should be enough.
- Caleb Fitzharmon]]
6012 port_task_catherby_courier_3 158 [[21], [Vials to the holy island], [0], [22], [0], [5707], [5707], [5713], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31700, 8], None, None, None, None, None, [6119], [I've got a massive delivery of vials that need taking to Entrana. The previous sailor was denied access, so make sure you don't have any weapons or armour on you. The monks don't take kindly to those who break their rules.
- Catherby Port Master]]
6013 port_task_catherby_courier_4 158 [[22], [Misplaced silk], [0], [28], [0], [5707], [5707], [5710], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31701, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [6115], [Another sailor decided to dump his cargo here instead of going to Ardougne. There's five crates for the Ardougne silk merchant. I need someone else to take them there.
- Catherby Port Master]]
6014 port_task_catherby_courier_5 158 [[23], [Pineapple madness], [0], [26], [0], [5707], [5709], [5707], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31702, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6117], [For some reason, our charter ship services are always swamped with people who want pineapples. We need an emergency resupply to keep up with demand. Looking for a fast ship to fetch us some crates from Brimhaven.
- Catherby Charter Ship Services]]
6015 port_task_catherby_courier_6 158 [[24], [Shrimp for the Shrimp and Parrot], [0], [31], [0], [5707], [5707], [5709], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31703, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6116], [Got a delivery of fresh fish to be taken to the Shrimp and Parrot in Brimhaven. I'd hurry if I were you. I hear the owner associates with pirates and he won't be happy if the fish are spoiled when he gets them.
- Harry]]
6016 port_task_catherby_courier_7 158 [[25], [Cabbage crazy], [0], [31], [1], [5707], [5707], [5710], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31704, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [6115], [A sickly man asked me if I could grow him some cabbages and send them down to Ardougne. I couldn't believe when he asked me for five crates worth! Cabbages are normally below my pay grade, but it's a nice change from watermelons.
- Dantaera]]
6017 port_task_catherby_courier_8 158 [[26], [GPDT Fast-track required], [0], [36], [1], [5707], [5710], [5707], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31705, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6117], [I purchased two crates of steel arrowtips weeks ago and they still haven't arrived. I need a someone with a boat to head down to Ardougne and get them for me. I'm done waiting for the GPDT to eventually get around to it.
- Hickton]]
6018 port_task_catherby_courier_9 158 [[27], [Need help with a karambwan delivery], [0], [36], [1], [5707], [5709], [5707], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31706, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6117], [I've finally managed to persuade the old man in Brimhaven to send me a crate of karambwan. I need someone to head over there and fetch it for me.
- Caleb Fitzharmon]]
6019 port_task_catherby_courier_10 158 [[28], [Khazard rennovations], [0], [30], [1], [5707], [5707], [5711], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31707, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [6122], [Port Khazard has been going through some major changes with the sudden increase in sailing activity of late. They require someone to deliver four crates of oak planks to them to help with some rennovations.
- Catherby Port Master]]
6020 port_task_catherby_courier_11 158 [[29], [Charter stock redistribution], [0], [46], [1], [5707], [5711], [5707], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31708, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [6117], [We can't keep up with the demand for soda ash, seaweed and buckets of sand! The crew at Port Khazard have agreed to send more over but it will take time. Could someone collect the supplies at Port Khazard for us instead?
- Catherby Charter Ship Services]]
6021 port_task_catherby_courier_12 158 [[30], [Got some coal that needs exporting], [0], [51], [1], [5707], [5707], [5711], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31709, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [6122], [Got a request for some coal by some guy down at Port Khazard. If you could deliver it for me that'd be much appreciated.
- Stankers]]
6022 port_task_catherby_courier_13 158 [[31], [Silver for Ardougne], [0], [56], [1], [5707], [5707], [5710], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31710, 6], None, None, None, None, None, [6115], [Someone misdelivered a shipment of silver jewellery that was intended for Ardougne. Looking for someone heading that way to take it with them. We'll compensate you well for the mismanagement on our part.
- Catherby Port Master]]
6023 port_task_catherby_courier_14 158 [[32], [Urgent request for the Spirit Anglers of Unkah!], [0], [50], [1], [5707], [5707], [5720], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31711, 8], None, None, None, None, None, [6124], [The spirit anglers over in Unkah need a constant delivery of buckets to keep fighting off Tempoross. I've fallen sick and can't make the delivery. If someone could do it on my behalf, that'd be appreciated.
- A sailor in need]]
6024 port_task_port_khazard_courier_0 158 [[33], [Murphy's catch of the day], [0], [41], [1], [5711], [5711], [5710], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31712, 6], None, None, None, None, None, [6115], [I'm in constant need of sailors to take my hauls to Ardougne. Anyone willing to deliver a few crates would have my thanks.
- Murphy]]
6025 port_task_port_khazard_courier_1 158 [[34], [Gold rush], [0], [41], [1], [5711], [5709], [5710], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31713, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [6115], [Gold is always in constant demand in Ardougne, but the closest mine is over in Brimhaven. I'll pay any sailor well if they can bring five crates of gold ore from Brimhaven to Ardougne.
- Ardougne Gold Merchant]]
6026 port_task_port_khazard_courier_2 158 [[35], [Mithril for our fleet], [0], [30], [1], [5711], [5710], [5711], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31714, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [6122], [Our fleet is in need of additional armour. Zenesha in Ardougne is willing to provide, but we require a sailor who can make the trip there and back to pick up our delivery.
- Khazard Captain]]
6027 port_task_port_khazard_courier_3 158 [[36], [Bert's sand delivery], [0], [30], [1], [5711], [5711], [5713], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31715, 6], None, None, None, None, None, [6119], [I need to refill the sand pit over in Entrana and am willing to pay a sailor to make the journey for me. I'd advise you to avoid taking weapons or armour though. The monks on the island don't take too kindly to that sort of thing.
- Bert]]
6028 port_task_port_khazard_courier_4 158 [[37], [Discretion required], [0], [46], [1], [5711], [5707], [5711], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31717, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6122], [We need someone discrete to pick up some 'stuff' from Catherby for us. The contents of the crates are not important to you, so no peeking. We'll know if you do.
- Nobody important]]
6029 port_task_port_khazard_courier_5 158 [[38], [Dragon equipment to Myths' Guild], [0], [46], [1], [5711], [5711], [5715], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31718, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6118], [There are some crates of dragon weaponry bound for the Myths' Guild. We need a boat to take them down to Corsair Cove.

6030 port_task_port_khazard_courier_6 158 [[39], [Emergency beer supply request], [0], [51], [1], [5711], [5704], [5711], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31684, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [6122], [Emergency! The sudden increase in pirates in the area has caused us to run out of beer, again. We've purchased what we can from Ardougne and Brimhaven, so we need someone to go over to Musa Point to collect a shipment.
- Angor, Fight Arena Bartender]]
6031 port_task_port_khazard_courier_7 158 [[40], [Spirit angler supply order], [0], [51], [1], [5711], [5711], [5720], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31719, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [6124], [Got a parts request from them spirit anglers down in Unkah. Seems their ships have taken a bit of a beating and need some repairs. There are five crates here with the materials they need.
- Sarah]]
6032 port_task_port_khazard_courier_8 158 [[41], [Need help with cargo recovery], [0], [56], [1], [5711], [5720], [5711], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31720, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6122], [Some idiot took three crates of dragon equipment bound for Corsair Cove and dropped them off at Unkah instead. I'm not sure how they messed that up so could anyone fetch them back to Port Khazard.
- Port Khazard Port Master]]
6033 port_task_port_khazard_courier_9 158 [[42], [Outfitting the anglers], [0], [50], [1], [5711], [5710], [5720], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31721, 6], None, None, None, None, None, [6124], [There's a shipment of spirit angler's equipment over at Ardougne that needs taking to Unkah. 6034 port_task_port_khazard_courier_10 158 [[43], [Angler's outfit recovery], [0], [61], [2], [5711], [5720], [5711], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31722, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [6122], [I need someone to head over to Unkah and collect some angler's outfits from the spirit anglers over there. - Murphy]]
6035 port_task_ruins_of_unkah_courier_0 158 [[44], [Banana collection], [0], [48], [1], [5720], [5704], [5720], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31682, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [6124], [Fresh fruits from Karamja are really popular over here in Pollnivneach. 6046 port_task_pandemonium_courier_0 158 [[81], [Fish delivery], [0], [1], [0], [5702], [5702], [5701], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31681, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6114], [Gerrant in Port Sarim is struggling to keep his store stocked with fish, so I've made a deal to send some of my excess over. I need someone quick and reliable to get the fish to him.
- Henderson]]
6047 port_task_pandemonium_courier_1 158 [[82], [Fish for 'The Face'], [0], [1], [0], [5702], [5702], [5701], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31703, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6114], [Someone calling themselves 'The Face' apparently needs a large amount of fish to feed their 'clients' with. Seems a bit weird, but they're paying well. I need someone to make the delivery to Port Sarim for me.
- Henderson]]
6048 port_task_pandemonium_courier_2 158 [[83], [Billy-no-ship-parts], [0], [10], [0], [5702], [5702], [5704], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31719, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6120], [Sally over at Musa Point has only gone and run out of ship parts! Classic! I've agreed to send her some of my excess bits. I just need a top sailor to take them over there for me.
- Junior Jim]]
6049 port_task_pandemonium_courier_3 158 [[84], [Secret pirate buisness], [0], [10], [0], [5702], [5702], [5704], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31717, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6120], [I need a top Jolly Roger to help me conduct some super secret pirate business. - Steve Beanie]]
6050 port_task_pandemonium_courier_4 158 [[85], [We need more rum!], [0], [11], [0], [5702], [5704], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31687, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6121], [The rum is gone! I definitely ordered in the right amount, so it is most likely certainly maybe guaranteed to not be my fault. I need someone to drop their stern and sail over to Musa Point to collect some more!
- Steve Beanie]]
6051 port_task_pandemonium_courier_5 158 [[86], [Steel collection], [0], [1], [0], [5702], [5701], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31729, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6121], [Thanks to some top parleying, I've got my hands on some steel bars. - Parleying Preston]]
6052 port_task_pandemonium_courier_6 158 [[87], [Jewellery delivery], [0], [9], [0], [5702], [5702], [5701], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31710, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6114], [I've got a couple of crates of jewellery acquired through entirely legitimate means. - One Eyed Rosalee]]
6053 port_task_pandemonium_courier_7 158 [[88], [Return to sender], [0], [15], [0], [5702], [5702], [5704], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31683, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6120], [I thought a merchant vessel was carrying valuable goods from Musa Point, but it turned out to just be a lot of bananas. - Captain Harry Robin]]
6054 port_task_pandemonium_courier_8 158 [[89], [Pirate grog delivery], [0], [21], [0], [5702], [5702], [5707], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31686, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6117], [Yo ho ho! I need a top sailor to set out on a pirate adventure for me. I have a couple of crates of grog that need taking to Catherby. Hoist your anchor and get to it!
- Steve Beanie]]
6055 port_task_pandemonium_courier_9 158 [[90], [In need of arrowtips], [0], [21], [0], [5702], [5707], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31705, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6121], [I need a couple of crates of steel arrowtips collecting from Catherby and delivering to the Pandemonium. - One Eyed Rosalee]]
6056 port_task_pandemonium_courier_10 158 [[91], [Pineapple collection], [0], [26], [0], [5702], [5709], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31723, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6121], [One of my usual captains has fallen ill, so I need someone to quickly step in. 6057 port_task_pandemonium_courier_11 158 [[92], [Sending sand], [0], [28], [0], [5702], [5702], [5710], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31715, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [6115], [Trader Stan's lot still aren't delivering to Ardougne directly, so it seems there's a business opportunity here. I've found a partner there willing to buy as much sand as I can send. I just need someone to make the voyage.
- John Johnson]]
6058 port_task_pandemonium_courier_12 158 [[93], [Cocktails for all], [0], [50], [0], [5702], [5702], [5720], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31741, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6124], [I've got a few cocktails of my own creation that I'd like sending over to the hard workers at the Ruins of Unkah. I still owe them for a small issue they helped with a while back while I was on pirate business. Jolly Roger!
- Steve Beanie]]
6059 port_task_pandemonium_courier_13 158 [[94], [Urgent delivery], [0], [30], [1], [5702], [5702], [5711], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31753, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6122], [Apparently some foolish sailors in Port Khazard have been making voyages without protection against the Curse of Hawkeyed Mildred! Get these kyatt teeth over there fast! The magic within them will keep those sailors safe.
- Ribs]]
6060 port_task_pandemonium_courier_14 158 [[95], [Tar needed], [0], [30], [1], [5702], [5711], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31694, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6121], [I need some swamp paste collecting from Port Khazard to fix some ship damaged caused by nuisance pirates. I hope they're happy with the inconvenience they've caused.
- Captain Dawson]]
6061 port_task_prying_times 158 [[55], [Secret pirate looty], [0], [14], [0], None, [5701], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31774, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6121], [Some well hidden pirate looty is pretending to be a crate in Port Sarim. Bring it to The Pandemonium and leave it with the port master.
- Steve Beanie]]
6062 port_task_musa_point_0 158 [[102], [Cargo reclaims], [0], [10], [0], [5704], [5701], [5704], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31775, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6120], [Our partner in Port Sarim wants to return a crate of bananas. Apparently, they've all been squashed by a bottle of rum someone shoved in there! Bring it back for me.
- Luthas]]
6063 port_task_musa_point_1 158 [[103], [Patch note], [0], [10], [0], [5704], [5702], [5704], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31776, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6120], [Y'arr, the trendsetters in Mos Le'Harmless be wearin' two eye patches at the same time, and now the rest of us 'ave run dry. Make sail to the Pandemonium and fetch ye a fresh crate from Steve.
- Not A Pirate]]
6064 port_task_musa_point_2 158 [[104], [Precious delivery], [0], [10], [0], [5704], [5704], [5701], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31777, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6114], [Running low on gold for my business, could somebody transport a shipment of gold ore to Port Sarim as soon as possible?
- Grum]]
6065 port_task_musa_point_3 158 [[105], [Pining for Pineapples], [0], [11], [0], [5704], [5704], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31778, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6121], [I need more pineapples for the Pandemonium's signature cocktail, the Bright and Noisy! - Steve Beanie]]
6066 port_task_musa_point_4 158 [[106], [Stop your wining!], [0], [12], [0], [5704], [5702], [5704], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31779, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [6120], [We're running low on wine jugs, could someone fetch a shipment from the Pandemonium for me?

6067 port_task_musa_point_5 158 [[107], [No leg to stand on], [0], [13], [0], [5704], [5701], [5704], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31780, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6120], [There be a rascally woodworm aboard ship and we're in dire need of a bounty o' peg legs from the Varrock lumbermill. Needs to arr-ive as soon as possible.
- Not A Pirate]]
6068 port_task_musa_point_6 158 [[108], [Smooth sailing], [0], [13], [0], [5704], [5704], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31781, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6121], [I make this fabulous blended banana drink, very good for you, do come try it some time - but first, fetch me the finest bananas Luthas has to offer!
- Steve Beanie]]
6069 port_task_musa_point_7 158 [[109], [General supplies], [0], [21], [0], [5704], [5707], [5704], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31782, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [6120], [I have some crates of general supplies waiting for delivery at Catherby, could someone pick them up and deliver them back here for me?
- Musa Point general store manager]]
6070 port_task_musa_point_8 158 [[110], [Going bananas], [0], [21], [0], [5704], [5704], [5707], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31783, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [6117], [The people in Catherby left my bananas a great review: “Nice!” I'd like to send them a free crate as thanks. - Luthas]]

6077 port_task_bounty_port_sarim_0 158 [[57], [Mudskipper panic], [1], [1], [0], [5701], [5701], [5701], None, None, None, None, None, [1], None, None, None, None, None, [14456], [31791], [5], [3], [6134], [There have been reports of a shiver of famished sharks attacking nearby swimmers at Mudskipper point. 6101 port_task_bounty_pandemonium_0 158 [[96], [Mudskipper sharks], [1], [1], [0], [5702], [5702], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, [1], None, None, None, None, None, [14456], [31791], [4], [3], [6134], [Some famished sharks near Mudskipper Point are making it a nightmare to get any fishing done. - Henderson]]
6102 port_task_bounty_pandemonium_1 158 [[97], [Shark problems], [1], [27], [2], [5702], [5702], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, [1], None, None, None, None, None, [14458], [31792], [1], [10], [6134], [There's a pretty nasty crandor shark causing us problems on our route to Musa Point. - Seaman Morris]]
6103 port_task_bounty_pandemonium_2 158 [[98], [Willing to parley], [1], [15], [2], [5702], [5702], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, [1], None, None, None, None, None, [14460], [31793], [1], [8], [6135], [Ribs told me that karamjan tiger shark teeth act as protective charms against Davey Jones. - Parleying Preston]]
6104 port_task_bounty_pandemonium_3 158 [[99], [Albatross feathers needed], [1], [48], [2], [5702], [5702], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, [1], None, None, None, None, None, [14482], [31806], [12], [1], [6126], [Yo ho ho! - Steve Beanie]]
6105 port_task_bounty_pandemonium_4 158 [[100], [Curse of the Kharazi], [1], [44], [2], [5702], [5702], [5702], None, None, None, None, None, [1], None, None, None, None, None, [14478], [31801], [3], [4], [6132], [I hear tale of a deadly monodon lurking in Kharazi Strait!
